text: You can now fund Infinex directly from a bank account. When you choose Bank transfer in the deposit dialog, you accept the terms, verify your identity, and Infinex issues a permanent US account number and routing number in your name. Send USD to it by ACH push or wire, the same way you move money to any account. The funds convert to USDC automatically and arrive on-chain in your wallet. Verify once, and that account stays yours to reuse for every deposit after.

Getting dollars on-chain has usually meant routing through an exchange first. Bank transfer in Infinex removes that step. Pick Bank transfer in the deposit dialog, accept the terms, and verify your identity once. You receive a US bank account number and routing number issued in your name. Any USD you send to it, by ACH or wire, converts to USDC and settles on-chain to the wallet you specify. The account is permanent, so your bank becomes a standing rail into Infinex rather than a one-time errand.

Bank transfer is now a deposit method inside Infinex, sitting alongside the other ways to fund. The flow is short: open Bank transfer, accept the terms, verify your identity. Infinex, working with Bridge.xyz, issues a US account number and routing number in your name. Push USD to it by ACH or send a wire. It converts to USDC and lands on-chain in your wallet, with the conversion handled for you. Set it up once and the rail stays open.

The simplest funding path is the one you already use every day: your bank. Infinex now lets you deposit USD by ACH push or wire transfer. You verify your identity and accept the terms once, then receive a permanent US account number and routing number in your name. Money sent there converts to USDC and is delivered on-chain to your wallet automatically. You only have to send the dollars. The rest is carried for you.

Funding Infinex from a bank account is now live. Choose Bank transfer in the deposit dialog and you'll be issued a US account number and routing number in your name after a one-time identity check and terms acceptance. Send USD to it by ACH or wire. The funds convert to USDC and arrive on-chain at the wallet address you specify. Because the account is permanent and reusable, every future deposit is simply another transfer to an account you already hold.

You can now fund Infinex straight from your bank. Send USD by ACH or wire to an account in your name. It converts to USDC and lands on-chain in your wallet.
Fund Infinex from a bank account. USD in by ACH or wire, USDC out on-chain to your wallet. Verify once and the account is yours to reuse.
Dollars to chain, without the exchange detour. Send USD to your Infinex bank account; it converts to USDC and settles on-chain automatically.

You can now fund Infinex straight from your bank account. No exchange detour to get dollars on-chain.

Here is how it works. You get a permanent US account number and routing number, issued in your name. Send USD to it by ACH push or wire, the way you'd pay any account.

Funds sent there convert to USDC automatically and arrive on-chain in your wallet. Verify your identity and accept the terms once, then the account is yours to reuse.

Bank transfer is live in Infinex.

Deposit USD by ACH or wire to an account issued in your name. It converts to USDC and settles on-chain to your wallet, automatically.

Verify once. The account is permanent and reusable, so funding from your bank becomes a standing rail, not a one-time trick.

Getting dollars on-chain has always meant an exchange in the middle. Not anymore in Infinex.

Bank transfer is now a deposit method. A US account number in your name takes USD by ACH or wire, and the conversion to USDC on-chain is handled for you.

Verify your identity and accept the terms once. After that, your bank account points straight to your wallet.

New in Infinex: fund directly from your bank.

You receive a permanent US account number and routing number in your name. Send USD there however you normally move money.

It lands as USDC in your wallet on-chain. One identity check up front, then a rail you reuse whenever you want to add funds.

Bank transfer just joined the deposit methods in Infinex.

Open it, accept the terms, verify your identity. Infinex issues a US account number and routing number in your name through Bridge.xyz.

Send USD to it by ACH or wire. It converts to USDC and arrives on-chain. The account stays yours for every deposit after.
